overview.description: Test generate variable creation and usage
overview.name: Variable(generate) Test

var.comment: Create random numeric variable of length 10
var.name: generateNumeric

condition.comment: Check if the numeric variable is exactly 10 digits
condition.name: generateNumericCondition

assert.comment: Check if the condition for numeric variable is true

equal.comment: Check if the condition for numeric variable is true

var.comment: Create random alphabetic variable of length 8
var.name: generateAlphabetic

condition.comment: Check if the alphabetic variable contains only letters and has length 8
condition.name: generateAlphabeticCondition

assert.comment: Check if the condition for alphabetic variable is true

equal.comment: Check if the condition for alphabetic variable is true

var.comment: Create random alphanumeric variable of length 12
var.name: generateAlphanumeric

condition.comment: Check if alphanumeric variable is 12 characters letters+digits
condition.name: generateAlphanumericCondition

assert.comment: Assert alphanumeric variable condition is true

equal.comment: Assert alphanumeric variable condition is true

var.comment: Create random variable from regex pattern of length 6
var.name: generateRegexVar

condition.comment: Check if regex variable matches pattern
condition.name: generateRegexCondition

assert.comment: Assert regex variable condition is true

equal.comment: Assert regex variable condition is true
